name: Pasta and Basil Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 oz (60 g) vermicelli or spaghetti, broken into short lengths
1 1.5 pint (900 ml) chicken or vegetable stock
5 1/2 oz (45 g) fresh basil leaves, shredded
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 tsp Grated parmesan cheese, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in a large pan of lightly salted boiling water, following the pack instructions. Drain and set aside.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan and add the onion, garlic, and pine nuts. Cook gently for 10 minutes until the onions are translucent and the pine nuts have turned golden-brown.
3. Add the stock and basil leaves to the pan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Add the cooked pasta and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Spoon the soup into warm bowls and sprinkle each serving with a teaspoon of grated parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
